label: 1572 CE
era_summary: Year 1572 (MDLXXII) was a leap year starting on Tuesday of the Julian calendar.

rome_italy.summary: Active conflicts in 1572: Turkey-Venice, Papal states, 1570-73. No Maddison GDP coverage for this region — economy held at neutral 50, reflecting the thin pre-modern record outside the European core. Governance held at neutral (V-Dem coverage starts 1789).
